title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-19
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Greenhouse Maintenance
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished watering the greenhouse and updating the daily app metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and the greenhouse directory in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: The robot companion checking a clipboard or watering plants in a greenhouse, representing automated maintenance of the app directory. Polly the bee hovering nearby in a gardener's hat.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny gardener's hat. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse.
